creator: Joerg.Pulz@frm2.tum.de
text:
Update the sysutils/nut* ports to the recent version 2.0.5 .
	This version includes many bugfixes, additional UPS drivers and support
	for new UPS devices.

	See http://www.networkupstools.org/source/2.0/new-2.0.5.txt for details.

	Successfully tinderbox tested on:
	RELENG_4	i386
	RELENG_5	i386
	RELENG_6	i386, amd64
	CURRENT		i386

Fix: - apply the patch
